features: SIMPLE LANDLINE PHONE – Keep in touch with your family and friends with ease using this Corded Slimline Phone from Benross! It’s ideal for use at home, or also in the office, thanks to its variety of features that make it well suited for all different kinds of calls.

TABLE OR WALL MOUNT – Easily access the phone at any time you need it with its versatile mounting system! It can be cleanly mounted on a wall to save space in a room, or alternatively, simply sit it on a table or desk – whichever is most convenient for you.

SLEEK SLIMLINE DESIGN – This phone’s slimline, handheld design makes it convenient and comfortable to use while talking. Its buttons are an adequate size for all users, featuring easy to see numbers that make it suitable for elderly users. The handset measures 20 x 5cm, creating a perfectly balanced size, and comes in a black colour.

BUTTON FEATURES – The phone’s buttons allow you to mute or pause calls, as well as featuring a flash function to allow you to transfer calls in an office environment. It also includes a last number redial button, ideal for when you want to call back a frequent close contact whose number you dialled previously. The volume is also adjustable, perfect for those who are hard of hearing.
BENROSS – Benross manufactures a multitude of electrical appliances. From extension cords and adapters, to heaters and coolers for the home, you can find it all at the Benross store on Amazon.
description: From the manufacturer Benross Slimline Telephone in Black This corded slimline telephone comes with easy-to-use buttons for when you just can't wait to share the good news or catch up on the gossip Will sit perfectly on a console table in your hallway or if you want to keep the house tidy simply wall mount for a cleaner look The phone comes with last number redial for ease when you want to call back the last number you dialed Ideal when in an office environment fitted with a PABX service and a flash button which allows you to transfer calls between extensions easily White Jumbo Black Jumbo White Classic Black Classic White Slimline Black Slimline Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 595 4.0 out of 5 stars 595 3.0 out of 5 stars 14 4.0 out of 5 stars 3 4.0 out of 5 stars 595 4.0 out of 5 stars 595 Price £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £16.24 £ 16 . 24 — no data £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 Colour White Black White Black White Black Can it be wall mounted? ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Speed Dial ✓ ✓ no data no data no data no data Flash Button ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Corded? ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
